description: Install and activate the 'Contact Form 7' plugin. Create a contact form titled 'General Inquiry Form' that includes a required 'Your Name' text field, a required 'Your Email' email field, a required 'Inquiry Type' dropdown with the options 'Media Inquiry', 'Volunteer Application', 'General Question', and 'Partnership Opportunity', an optional 'Organization' text field, a required 'Your Message' textarea, and a submit button. Configure the form's Mail settings to send submissions to 'communications@greenvalley.org'. Publish a new page titled 'Contact Us' with the 'General Inquiry Form' embedded.
